gifInfo:STRING: urban gallery space that contains a number of viewing areas.  The gallery is designed to be easily modifiable
geometry:STRING: so you can replace the artwork with your own.  In the long gallery area
column9: this environment has an entry-point object (these move avatars to their original spot upon entering the world).  The entry area includes a logo object that links to a welcome notice using the HTML web page object.  You can change the URL that the logo links to
